ValidationRule.description: INACTIVE. LAND close fulfillment gate: at 6. Closed Won requires Contract Signed, PAYG Paid, Users Provisioned. Complements LAND_Close_Requires_Commit_Terms. Stage provisional (OQ-009). Activation by Nic.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'LAND', ISPICKVAL(StageName, '6. Closed Won'), OR( NOT(Contract_Signed__c), NOT(PAYG_Paid__c), NOT(Users_Provisioned__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Antes de marcar Closed Won en una oportunidad LAND, confirma los requisitos operativos de cierre: Contrato Firmado (Contract Signed), PAYG Pagado (PAYG Paid) y Usuarios Aprovisionados (Users Provisioned).
